author: y4rr
content: Phase 5 V2 (paged gate_proj + internal toolingivation → TEAL refine → fault-in Up+DownT → sparse compute. ShadowLlm architecture + from_state_dict + predict_all_layers + set_shadow_llm wired in (training pipeline: architecture ready, calibration corpus + trainer is follow-up). 69 tests pass. Llama 3 8B end-to-end: cos_sim=0.998834 at TEAL=0.2 with paged gate, paged_argmax=dense_argmax=311. Total paged data went from 7.0 GiB to 10.5 GiB (3 projections); always-resident floor dropped from 8.2 GiB to ~4.5 GiB.
